column2: Verify that an RAE(PC) has been approved by the CAA after meeting all requirements
column3: ['Submit a request for approval as an RAE(PC). ', "Evaluate the RAE(PC)'s application and determine if they meet all requirements. ", 'Approve the RAE(PC) to carry out training and assessment of remote pilots against required competencies. ']
column4: ["The RAE(PC)'s application is successfully submitted. ", 'The CAA confirms that the RAE(PC) meets all approval requirements. ', 'The CAA issues an approval for the RAE(PC) to conduct training and assessment of remote pilots according to their specified competency requirements. ']
